tiles.title: Long Shift Penalties
tiles.description: Shifts over 10 hours across 1 shop(s). OT and spread premiums may apply.

tiles.title: Over 40 + Vacation
tiles.description: Hourly employees whose worked + leave exceeded 40 hrs in a week. 1 complete Mon–Sun week(s) in this period.

tiles.title: Unapproved Timecards
tiles.description: 74 timecards still unapproved across the full pay period.

tiles.title: Pending Leave
tiles.description: Leave requests overlapping this pay period not yet approved or denied.

tiles.title: Penalty Pay
tiles.description: 7 penalty event(s) (meal/rest breaks, predictability pay, etc.).

tiles.title: Approved, Not Yet Paid
tiles.description: Hourly timecards approved but not yet marked Paid across 44 shop(s). Should reach 0 before payroll closes.
